task_completion.description: Verify that the 'review-now' tag has been added to the pre-2010 priority papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the reference manager interface. The papers 'The UNIX Time-Sharing System', 'End-to-End Arguments in System Design', 'The Google File System', and 'Chord' should have the tag 'review-now' applied to them. Ensure non-priority papers do not have this tag.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'review-later' tag has been added to the post-2010 priority papers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the reference manager interface. The paper 'Raft: In Search of an Understandable Consensus Algorithm' should have the tag 'review-later' applied to it. Ensure non-priority papers do not have this tag.

task_completion.description: Verify that a saved search named 'Review Now' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the collections/folders pane in the reference manager. There should be a saved search (often indicated by a magnifying glass or special folder icon) explicitly named 'Review Now'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Review Now' saved search contains the correct items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Review Now' saved search is selected, the main list should display exactly the papers tagged with 'review-now' (e.g., UNIX, End-to-End, GFS, Chord).

task_completion.description: Verify that the results were exported as a BibTeX file to the correct desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file explorer, desktop view, or terminal showing the file 'review_now.bib' located at '/home/ga/Desktop/'. If the file contents are visible, it should be in standard BibTeX format containing the 'review-now' papers.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the reference manager's graphical user interface to apply tags and create the saved search.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the reference manager application open with menus, tag selectors, or search dialogs being actively used, rather than terminal commands modifying a database directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the 'Review Now' item is a genuine dynamic saved search, not a static folder.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Review Now' item in the sidebar should have the icon of a saved search/smart folder, not a standard static collection/folder icon.

integrity.description: Ensure the BibTeX file was generated via the application's export functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the application's export dialog being used, or the resulting .bib file containing standard auto-generated BibTeX formatting, rather than a manually typed text file or a simple terminal echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Pre-2010 priority papers requiring the 'review-now' tag: The UNIX Time-Sharing System (1974), End-to-End Arguments in System Design (1984), The Google File System (2003), and Chord (2001). Post-2010 priority paper requiring the 'review-later' tag: Raft (2014).
